name: aiscan
description: AIScan MCP server — audit any website for AI agent readiness. Returns 0–100 score, letter grade, and plain-English fix instructions for failing checks.

tools.name: scan_website
tools.description: Run a full AI-readiness scan on a website. Returns the complete ScanResult JSON.

tools.name: get_fixes
tools.description: Return only the failing/partial checks with remediation text and ordered fix steps.

tools.name: get_grade
tools.description: Return only the overall score and letter grade for a URL.
